sections.title: The greatest heroes of the land
Talking to Achietties or trying to enter the guild

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: Greetings. Welcome to the Heroes' Guild.

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: Only the greatest heroes of this land may gain entrance to this guild.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm a hero. May I apply to join?

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: You're a hero? I've never heard of you.

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: Well, you seem to meet our initial requirements, so you may now begin the tasks to earn membership in the Heroes' Guild.

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: The three items required for entrance are: An Entranan Firebird feather, a Master Thieves' armband, and a cooked Lava Eel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any hints on getting the thieves armband?

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: I'm sure you have the relevant contacts to find out about that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any hints on getting the feather?

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: Not really - other than Entranan firebirds tend to live on Entrana.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any hints on getting the eel?

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: Maybe go and find someone who knows a lot about fishing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll start looking for all those things then.

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: Good luck with that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good for the foremost heroes of the land.

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: Yes. Yes it is.

sections.title: Talking to Achietties or trying to enter the guild again without the three items

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: Greetings. Welcome to the Heroes' Guild.

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: How goes thy quest adventurer?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's tough. I've not done it yet.

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: Remember, the items you need to enter are:

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: An Entranan Firebirds' feather, A Master Thieves armband, and a cooked Lava Eel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How would I go about getting a Master Thief armband?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Ooh... tricky stuff. Took me YEARS to get that rank.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Well, what some of the more aspiring thieves in our gang are working on right now is to steal some very valuable candlesticks from Scarface Pete - the pirate leader on Karamja.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: His security is excellent, and the target very valuable so that might be enough to get you the rank.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Go talk to our man Alfonse, the waiter in the Shrimp and Parrot.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Use the secret word 'gherkin' to show you're one of us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What am I supposed to be doing again?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: You told me you wanted to get a Master thief's armband! Now pay attention.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Some of the more aspiring thieves in our gang are working on right now is to steal some very valuable candlesticks from Scarface Pete - the pirate leader on Karamja.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: His security is excellent, and the target very valuable so that might be enough to get you the rank.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Go talk to our man Alfonse, the waiter in the Shrimp and Parrot.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Use the secret word 'gherkin' to show you're one of us.

sections.title: Trying to go into the kitchen early

lines.speaker: Alfonse the waiter
lines.text: Hey! You can't go through there! That's private property!

lines.speaker: Alfonse the waiter
lines.text: Welcome to the Shrimp and Parrot. Would you like to order, sir?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you sell Gherkins?

lines.speaker: Alfonse the waiter
lines.text: Hmmmm Gherkins eh? Ask Charlie the cook, round the back. He may have some 'gherkins' for you!

lines.speaker: Charlie the cook
lines.text: Hey! What are you doing back here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for a gherkin...

lines.speaker: Charlie the cook
lines.text: Aaaaaah... a fellow Phoenix! So, tell me compadre... what brings you to sunny Brimhaven?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sun, sand and the fresh sea air!

lines.speaker: Charlie the cook
lines.text: Well, can't say I blame you compadre. I used to be a city boy myself, but have to admit it's a lot nicer living here nowadays. Brimhaven's certainly good for it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to steal Scarface Pete's candlesticks.

lines.speaker: Charlie the cook
lines.text: Ah yes, of course. The candlesticks. Well, I have to be honest with you compadre, we haven't made much progress in that task ourselves so far. We can however offer

lines.speaker: Charlie the cook
lines.text: a little assistance. The setting up of this restaurant was the start of things; we have a secret door out the back of here that leads through the back of Mr Olbors' garden.

lines.speaker: Charlie the cook
lines.text: Now, at the other side of Mr Olbors' garden, is an old side entrance to Scarface Pete's mansion. It seems to have been blocked off from the rest of the mansion some years ago

lines.speaker: Charlie the cook
lines.text: and we can't seem to find a way through. We're positive this is the key to entering the house undetected however, and I promise to let you know if we find anything there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mind if I check it out for myself?

lines.speaker: Charlie the cook
lines.text: Not at all! The more minds we have working on the problem, the quicker we get that loot!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm a fellow member of the Phoenix gang.

lines.speaker: Charlie the cook
lines.text: Aaaaaah... a fellow Phoenix! So, tell me compadre... what brings you to sunny Brimhaven?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just exploring...

lines.speaker: Charlie the cook
lines.text: Well get out! This kitchen isn't for exploring! It's a private establishment! It's out of bounds to customers!

sections.title: Attempting to enter Scarface Pete's mansion from the front

lines.speaker: Garv
lines.text: Oi! Where do you think you're going pal?

lines.speaker: Garv
lines.text: Hello. What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I go in there?

lines.speaker: Garv
lines.text: No. In there is private.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want for nothing!

lines.speaker: Garv
lines.text: You're one of a very lucky few then.

lines.speaker: Grubor
lines.text: Yes? What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you like your hedges trimming?

lines.speaker: Grubor
lines.text: Eh? Don't be daft! We don't even HAVE any hedges!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to come in.

lines.speaker: Grubor
lines.text: No, go away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you want to trade?

lines.speaker: Grubor
lines.text: No, I'm busy.

sections.title: Attempting to enter Scarface Pete's mansion without using the key

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This room isn't a lot of use on its own... Maybe I can get extra help from the inside somehow... I wonder if any of the other players have found a way in.

sections.title: Attempting to hand in Pete's Candlestick if you've obtained it too early

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have retrieved a candlestick!

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Well, in all honesty, you didn't actually retrieve it yourself, did you? You don't qualify as a master thief unless you actually steal it yourself, you know...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have retrieved a candlestick!

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Hmmm. Not bad, not bad. Let's see it, make sure it's genuine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So is this enough to get me a Master Thief armband?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Hmm...

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: I dunno...

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Aww, go on then. I suppose I'm in a generous mood today.

sections.title: Talking to Straven after the quest without having a Master Thief armband

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid I've lost my Master Thief armband.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Lucky for you I have a spare. Don't lose it again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there any way I can get the rank of master thief?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Master thief? Ain't we the ambitious one!

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Well, you're gonna have to do something pretty amazing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything you can suggest?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Well, some of the MOST coveted prizes in thiefdom right now are in the pirate town of Brimhaven on Karamja.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: The pirate leader Scarface Pete has a pair of extremely valuable candlesticks.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: His security is VERY good.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: We, of course, have gang members in a town like Brimhaven who may be able to help you.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Visit our hideout in the alleyway on Palm Street. To get in you will need to tell them the secret password 'four leafed clover'.

lines.speaker: Grubor
lines.text: Yes? What do you want?

lines.speaker: Grubor
lines.text: Eh? What are you on about? Go away!

lines.speaker: Grubor
lines.text: Oh, you're one of the gang are you? Ok, hold up a second, I'll just let you in through here.

lines.speaker: Grubor
lines.text: Eh? What are you on about? Go away!

lines.speaker: Grubor
lines.text: Eh? What are you on about? Go away!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Grubor
lines.text: Hi. I'm a little busy right now.

lines.speaker: Trobert
lines.text: Hi. Welcome to our Brimhaven headquarters. I'm Trobert and I'm in charge here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So can you help me get Scarface Pete's candlesticks?

lines.speaker: Trobert
lines.text: Well, we have made some progress there. We know that one of the only keys to Pete's treasure room is carried by Grip, the head guard, so we thought it might be good to get close to him somehow.

lines.speaker: Trobert
lines.text: Grip was taking on a new deputy called Hartigen, an Asgarnian Black Knight who was deserting the Black Knight Fortress and seeking new employment here on Brimhaven.

lines.speaker: Trobert
lines.text: We managed to waylay him on the journey here, and steal his I.D. papers. Now all we need is to find somebody willing to impersonate him and take the deputy role to get that key for us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I volunteer to undertake that mission!

lines.speaker: Trobert
lines.text: Good good. Here's the I.D. papers. Take them and introduce yourself to the guards at Scarface Pete's mansion. We'll have that treasure in no time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, good luck then.

lines.speaker: Trobert
lines.text: Someone will show up eventually.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Pleased to meet you.

lines.speaker: Trobert
lines.text: Likewise.

lines.speaker: Trobert
lines.text: How's it going?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fine, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have lost Hartigen's ID paper...

lines.speaker: Trobert
lines.text: Well that was careless of you wasn't it? Fortunately for you, he had a spare. Take this one, but please try to be more careful with this one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have lost Hartigen's ID papers...

lines.speaker: Trobert
lines.text: Well that was careless of you, wasn't it? Fortunately for you, he had a spare set. Take this one, but please try to be more careful with it.

lines.speaker: Garv
lines.text: Oi! Where do you think you're going pal?

lines.speaker: Garv
lines.text: Hello. What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi. I'm Hartigen. I've come to work here.

lines.speaker: Garv
lines.text: Hartigen the Black Knight? I don't think so. He doesn't dress like that.

lines.speaker: Garv
lines.text: I assume you have your I.D. papers then?

lines.speaker: Garv
lines.text: You'd better come in then. Grip will want to talk to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh... yeeeeaaaaah.... about that.... I must have left them in my other suit of armour....

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there. I am Hartigen. reporting for duty as your new deputy sir!

lines.speaker: Grip
lines.text: Ah good, at last. You took your time getting here! Now let me see...

lines.speaker: Grip
lines.text: I'll get your hours and duty roster sorted out in a while. Oh, and do you have your I.D. papers with you? Internal security is almost as important as external security for a guard.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right here sir!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So can I guard the treasure room please?

lines.speaker: Grip
lines.text: Well, I might post you outside it sometimes. I prefer to be the only one allowed inside however.

lines.speaker: Grip
lines.text: There's some pretty valuable artefacts in there! Those keys stay ONLY with the head guard and Scarface Pete.

lines.speaker: Grip
lines.text: You'll have various guard related duties on various shifts. I'll assign specific duties as they are required as and when they become necessary. Just so you know, if anything happens to me

lines.speaker: Grip
lines.text: you'll need to take over as head guard here. You'll find important keys to the treasure room and Pete's quarters inside my jacket - although I doubt anything bad's going to happen to

lines.speaker: Grip
lines.text: me anytime soon!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything I can do now?

lines.speaker: Grip
lines.text: Hmm. Well, you could find out what this key opens for me. Apparently it's for something in this building, but for the life of me I can't find what.

lines.speaker: Grip
lines.text: Can't think of anything right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'd better sort my new room out.

lines.speaker: Grip
lines.text: Yeah, I'll give you time to settle in. Better get a good nights sleep, I expect you to report for duty at oh five hundred hours tomorrow on the dot!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear... I don't have that with me anymore..

lines.speaker: Grip
lines.text: Well that's no good! Go get them immediately, then report back for duty.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't attack the head guard here! There are too many witnesses around to see me do it! I'd have the whole of Brimhaven after me! Besides, if he dies I want the promotion!

sections.title: When searching through his drinks cabinet

lines.speaker: Pirate Guard
lines.text: I don't think Mr Grip will like you opening that. That's his private drinks cabinet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He won't notice me having a quick look.

lines.speaker: Grip
lines.text: Stay out of my drinks cabinet!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll leave it.

sections.title: Searching the chest with the candlesticks
Attempting to hand in Pete's Candlestick if you've obtained it too early

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a candlestick now!

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Good for you.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: I'll be giving a master thieves armband to the one who retrieved that. I know it wasn't you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a candlestick now!

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Wow.... is... it REALLY it?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: This really is a FINE bit of thievery.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Us thieves have been trying to get hold of this one for a while!

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: You wanted to be ranked as a master thief didn't you? Well, I guess this just about ranks as good enough!

sections.title: Talking to a monk on Entrana before getting ice gloves

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: Greetings traveller.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, I am in search of an Entranan Firebird. Can you help me?

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: Oh ho! Another one! I don't think they exist, but you'd probably ask the head monk about it. If anyone would know, he would!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: Anything else you wanted to know?

sections.title: Talking to the High Priest on Entrana before getting ice gloves

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Many greetings. Welcome to our fair island.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, I am in search of an Entranan Firebird. Can you help me?

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Well adventurer, I have heard that they exist on this island, but have not ever seen one myself.

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: According to legend however, they are so hot that their merest touch can burn flesh.

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Apparently long ago a great hero used a pair of magical gloves, stolen from the Queen of the Ice to cool the bird down enough to catch as a pet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So where would I find this 'Queen of the Ice' then?

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: I know not adventurer, it was just a myth I was told as a young boy. Perhaps somewhere icy?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

sections.title: Investigating the rockslide on White Wolf Mountain
Attempting to pick up a fire feather without ice gloves

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ouch!

lines.speaker: Gerrant
lines.text: Welcome! You can buy fishing equipment at my store. We'll also buy anything you catch off you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to find out how to catch a lava eel.

lines.speaker: Gerrant
lines.text: Lava eels eh? That's a tricky one that is, you'll need a lava-proof fishing line. The method for making this would be to take an ordinary fishing rod, and then cover it with the fire-proof Blamish Oil.

lines.speaker: Gerrant
lines.text: You know... thinking about it... I may have a jar of Blamish Slime around here somewhere... Now where did I put it?

lines.speaker: Gerrant
lines.text: Aha! Here it is! Take this slime, mix it with some Harralander and water and you'll have the Blamish Oil you need for treating your fishing rod.

sections.title: Talking to Gerrant again with blamish snail slime, blamish oil, or an oily fishing rod

lines.speaker: Gerrant
lines.text: Welcome! You can buy fishing equipment at my store. We'll also buy anything you catch off you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to find out how to catch a lava eel.

lines.speaker: Gerrant
lines.text: You'll need a lava-proof fishing line. I'm sure I already gave you what you need for this - take an ordinary fishing rod, and then cover it with the fire-proof Blamish Oil.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know... I'd really rather not.

sections.title: Applying blamish oil to a fishing rod
Trying to hand in an uncooked lava eel

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: Greetings. Welcome to the Heroes' Guild.

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: How goes thy quest adventurer?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a raw Lava Eel!

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: That's nice. I require it to be cooked however.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh. Okay then.

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: Greetings. Welcome to the Heroes' Guild.

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: How goes thy quest adventurer?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have all the required items.

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: I see that you have. Well done; Now, to complete the quest, and gain entry to the Heroes' Guild in your final task all that you have to do is...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: W-what? What do you mean? There's MORE???

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: I'm sorry, I was just having a little fun with you. Just a little Heroes' Guild humour there. What I really meant was

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: Congratulations! You have completed the Heroes' Guild entry requirements! You will find the door now open for you! Enter, Hero! And take this reward!
